title: Error while compiling combine v9 in lxplus

posts.name: Aashwin Basnet
posts.text:
Dear experts,
I have been following the instructions in [1] to install combine v9 in lxplus. I also checked out the recommended tag and did a clean build as recommended. However, during compilation, I am getting lots of error messages, including an eventual segfault, that I have pasted in the cernbox link in [2].
Is this a known issue? I would appreciate any help in fixing this.
[1]https://cms-analysis.github.io/HiggsAnalysis-CombinedLimit/#combine-v9-recommended-version
[2]https://cernbox.cern.ch/s/vpmXwRPuMn5TQr8
posts.cooked_html:
Dear experts,

I have been following the instructions in [1] to install combine v9 in lxplus. I also checked out the recommended tag and did a clean build as recommended. However, during compilation, I am getting lots of error messages, including an eventual segfault, that I have pasted in the cernbox link in [2].

Is this a known issue? I would appreciate any help in fixing this.

[1]https://cms-analysis.github.io/HiggsAnalysis-CombinedLimit/#combine-v9-recommended-version
[2]https://cernbox.cern.ch/s/vpmXwRPuMn5TQr8

posts.name: Nicholas Wardle
posts.text:
Hi,
This may have something to do with the lxplus machines moving over to el9.
We have an open PR for updates to the docs to get around this but for now can you try the following?
cmssw-el7
cmsrel CMSSW_11_3_4
cd CMSSW_11_3_4/src
cmsenv
git clone https://github.com/cms-analysis/HiggsAnalysis-CombinedLimit.git HiggsAnalysis/CombinedLimit
cd HiggsAnalysis/CombinedLimit
Best
Nick

| Aashwin Basnet abasnetDecember 29 |

| - |

Thank you for your help. I can confirm that this seems to be resolving the issue for now. I am now able to set up and compile the repo.
Sincerely,
Aashwin
